vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô lượn sóng
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of trekking through undulating hills as they offer a moderate yet rewarding physical challenge.

vocab.meaning: những vùng nước sâu màu xanh ngọc biển
vocab.example: The sheer beauty of the aquamarine depths in the Mediterranean is what constantly draws me back to the coast.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác biệt lập/tĩnh mịch (tích cực)
vocab.example: High altitude environments provide a sense of solitude that is impossible to find in the bustling coastal resorts.

vocab.meaning: vùng liên triều (khu vực giữa mức thủy triều cao và thấp)
vocab.example: I love exploring the intertidal zone to observe the unique marine organisms that thrive in such a dynamic habitat.

vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi phủ tuyết trắng
vocab.example: Seeing the sun rise over the snow-capped summits is a spiritual experience that no beach holiday can replicate.

vocab.meaning: đa dạng sinh học vùng ven biển
vocab.example: The rich coastal biodiversity makes snorkeling an educational journey into a completely different world.
We stood at the edge of a rugged escarpment, marvelling at the vast valley stretching out beneath us.
Many people believe that the sea air has therapeutic qualities that can alleviate stress and respiratory issues.

vocab.meaning: đường ranh giới đỉnh núi lởm chởm
vocab.example: The jagged ridgeline against the twilight sky created a dramatic and unforgettable silhouette.
I prefer the sea because I am fascinated by the maritime heritage and the ancient port towns that line the shore.
